results.rendered_html: potṛ or potṛ, m. ‘Purifier’, N. of one of the 16 officiating priests at a sacrifice (the assistant of the Brāhman; = yajñasya śodhayiṭri,  Sāy. ),  RV. ;  Br. ;  ŚrS. ;  Hariv.
